indobert_run_comparison.note: Baseline fine-tuning; highest accuracy but weaker Neutral recall/F1.
Weighted loss improved Neutral recall and Macro F1 over baseline.
Selected final candidate; best Macro F1, Weighted F1, and Neutral F1 among completed runs.
Slang normalization experiment; did not outperform Run 3.

svm_scenario_comparison.note: Exploratory 7-class baseline with higher minority-class instability.
Selected stable taxonomy aligned with AHP/Fuzzy AHP criteria.

final_aspect_criteria.description: Issues related to available features, playlists, lyrics, recommendations, content completeness, music/podcast availability, and audio listening quality.
final_aspect_criteria.name: Features, Content & Audio Experience
final_aspect_criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

final_aspect_criteria.description: Issues related to performance, stability, errors, crashes, loading, responsiveness, interface usability, navigation, and interaction flow.
final_aspect_criteria.name: App Reliability & Usability
final_aspect_criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

final_aspect_criteria.description: Issues related to advertisement frequency, interruption, placement, skipping, and perceived disruption in the listening experience.
final_aspect_criteria.name: Ads Experience
final_aspect_criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

final_aspect_criteria.description: Issues related to premium subscription, price, payment methods, billing, packages, and perceived value for money.
final_aspect_criteria.name: Subscription & Pricing
final_aspect_criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

final_aspect_criteria.description: Issues related to account access, login failures, password, email, verification, registration, and account state problems.
final_aspect_criteria.name: Account/Login
final_aspect_criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

limitations: IndoBERT sentiment evaluation uses the prepared sentiment labels from the research pipeline; remaining label noise can affect reported metrics.

The SVM aspect classifier is trained and evaluated on weak labels derived from keyword-based aspect labeling. Therefore, evaluation reflects the ability to learn weak-label aspect patterns, not expert-validated ground truth.
The five selected aspect criteria are candidates for AHP/Fuzzy AHP and still require expert judgement validation before final priority weighting.
